_comment: Passive profiling for Codex CLI (mirror of .claude/settings.json). Hot path uses native hook_record_fast(.exe); rebuild it from hook_record_fast.c if missing. PostToolUse only keeps per-command overhead low; successful read-only plumbing commands are skipped. Records append to tmp/session_profiles/ for `node tools/ai.mjs status`. If hooks do not fire, ensure `[features] hooks = true` in .codex/config.toml (hooks are enabled by default in current Codex).
